title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入柬埔寨：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入柬埔寨：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Cambodia ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards adopted or referenced by ISC and the Electricity Authority of Cambodia (EAC), EAC grid-connection licensing for storage assets, EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) utility interconnection requirements, local building and fire authority installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与柬埔寨ISC（柬埔寨标准研究所）合格评定要求、ISC及柬埔寨电力管理局（EAC）采纳或引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、EAC储能资产并网许可、EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）公用事业互联要求、当地建筑和消防主管机关安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與柬埔寨ISC（柬埔寨標準研究所）合格評定要求、ISC及柬埔寨電力管理局（EAC）採納或引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、EAC儲能資產併網許可、EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）公用事業互聯要求、當地建築和消防主管機關安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ISC conformity scope determination, EAC grid-connection licence, EDC interconnection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current ISC standards, EAC licensing requirements, EDC grid-connection technical specifications, local building and fire authority requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ISC合格评定范围裁定、EAC并网许可证、EDC互联批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行ISC标准、EAC许可要求、EDC并网技术规格、当地建筑和消防主管机关要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ISC合格評定範圍裁定、EAC併網許可證、EDC互聯批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行ISC標準、EAC許可要求、EDC併網技術規格、當地建築和消防主管機關要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Cambodia does not yet have a comprehensive mandatory standalone BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 route or the EU Battery Regulation. The Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) adopts IEC-based standards, and the Electricity Authority of Cambodia (EAC) — the electricity regulator and licensor — sets grid-connection and licensing requirements for energy storage assets. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Cambodia are: (1) ISC conformity based on IEC 62619 (cell and module safety) and IEC 62933-5-2 (grid-integrated system safety) as the expected technical baseline for project and regulatory acceptance; (2) EAC licensing for grid-connected storage — formal EAC grid-connection approval is required for utility-scale and behind-meter BESS connected to the Cambodian grid; (3) EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) grid-connection approval for systems interconnecting with the EDC network; (4) local building and fire authority (Ministry of Interior / fire marshal) installation requirements — no BESS-specific fire code yet exists in Cambodia, but IEC 62933-5-2 and local building fire regulations apply; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions; and (6) 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid configuration for BESS power conversion systems. Chinese CQC/CCC marks and GB/T standards are not recognised by ISC or EAC as substitutes for IEC-based evidence.
answer_first.zh: 柬埔寨尚无与沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》相当的全面强制性独立BESS产品安全法规。柬埔寨标准研究所（ISC）采纳基于IEC的标准，柬埔寨电力管理局（EAC）——电力监管机构和许可机关——为储能资产设定并网及许可要求。中国BESS出口柬埔寨的实际差距包括：（1）基于IEC 62619（电芯和模组安全）和IEC 62933-5-2（并网系统安全）的ISC合规，作为项目和监管机构验收的预期技术基准；（2）并网储能EAC许可——接入柬埔寨电网的公用事业规模和表后BESS须取得正式EAC并网批准；（3）接入EDC电网的系统需取得EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）并网批准；（4）当地建筑和消防主管机关（内政部/消防督察）安装要求——柬埔寨目前尚无BESS专项消防规范，但适用IEC 62933-5-2及当地建筑消防法规；（5）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（6）BESS储能变流器的230/400 V、50 Hz电网配置。中国CQC/CCC标志和GB/T标准不被ISC或EAC接受为基于IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 柬埔寨尚無與沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》相當的全面強制性獨立BESS產品安全法規。柬埔寨標準研究所（ISC）採納基於IEC的標準，柬埔寨電力管理局（EAC）——電力監管機構和許可機關——為儲能資產設定併網及許可要求。中國BESS出口柬埔寨的實際差距包括：（1）基於IEC 62619（電芯和模組安全）和IEC 62933-5-2（併網系統安全）的ISC合規，作為項目和監管機構驗收的預期技術基準；（2）併網儲能EAC許可——接入柬埔寨電網的公用事業規模和表後BESS須取得正式EAC併網批准；（3）接入EDC電網的系統需取得EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）併網批准；（4）當地建築和消防主管機關（內政部/消防督察）安裝要求——柬埔寨目前尚無BESS專項消防規範，但適用IEC 62933-5-2及當地建築消防法規；（5）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（6）BESS儲能變流器的230/400 V、50 Hz電網配置。中國CQC/CCC標誌和GB/T標準不被ISC或EAC接受為基於IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
